settings.heading: Your images. Our tech.
settings.subheading: Custom 3D printed sculpture busts crafted from your photos.

settings.caption: Group photo crop to detailed likeness

settings.title: Order & upload
settings.text: Purchase and send us your favourite photo.

settings.title: We sculpt
settings.text: Our AI generates multiple 3D model options from your photo.

settings.title: You choose & we print
settings.text: Pick your favourite model and we print and deliver your bust.

settings.heading: Where craft meets code
settings.text: We believe everyone deserves to be immortalized in sculpture. What was once reserved for emperors and aristocrats is now available to anyone with a selfie and a sense of humor.

settings.quote: Absolutely incredible. My bust sits on my mantle and everyone asks about it. Worth every penny.
settings.author: Sarah M.

settings.quote: I gave one to my dad for Father's Day. He said it was the most narcissistic gift he's ever received — and also his favorite.
settings.author: James K.

settings.quote: The detail is mind-blowing. They even captured my crooked smile perfectly.
settings.author: Maya R.
